turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'd like to make an appointment to see a doctor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I'd be happy to help. Could you let me know the reason for your visit today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I've had a sore throat and cough for a few days.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Let's get you taken care of. Would you prefer to see a general practitioner, or is there a specific specialist you have in mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I don't know what his name is, but he is a old man and have a black glasses. I like that doctor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! I’ll do my best to help identify him. In the meantime, could you let me know which days and times would work best for your appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Um, is tomorrow morning... available?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Let me check that for you. Tomorrow morning should be possible. Do you have a preferred time, like early morning or maybe late morning?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Before 10 a.m., please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that sounds good. I'll look for an available slot before 10 a.m. Is there anything else you’d like me to note, like any allergies or special requests?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Um, I don't know is it important, but I have a sun allergy. Sunlight allergy.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you for letting me know; that’s definitely important. I'll make a note of that. Is there anything else you think I should be aware of before we finalize the appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Nothing, but I need a medical certificate for work.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, I’ll make sure to let the doctor know. We’ll arrange everything so that you can get that medical certificate as well. Is there anything else I can assist you with right now?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, that's all. Thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’ll get everything set up and confirm the appointment details for you. If you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Is there a fee for a medical certificate?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That's a great question. Usually, there might be a small fee for issuing a medical certificate, but I can confirm the exact amount for you. Would you like me to find out the specific fee details?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, yes, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I’ll check that and let you know the details shortly. In the meantime, if you have any other questions or need anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Now that's all I need to know.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, perfect! I’ll take care of everything and confirm the details for you. If anything else comes up, feel free to reach out. Take care!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, so see you tomorrow.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sounds great! See you tomorrow, and I hope you feel better soon. Take care!
